hero.headline: More time. Less stress.
hero.subheadline: A home that stays clean on autopilot.
hero.description: A simple home care plan that keeps your home calm and fresh, allowing you to spend your time on what truly matters.
hero.trustText: Trusted by busy households across Tampere

problem.headline: Your time shouldn't disappear into chores.
problem.intro: Workdays are full. Family life is busy. Your free time is limited. Yet cleaning keeps returning to the list.
points: The kitchen never stays done for long.
Even when you try to relax, the thought remains: 'We should really clean.'
problem.conclusion: Your home should help you unwind — not remind you of another task waiting.

transformation.headline: Imagine coming home to 'already done.'
transformation.intro: A clean, calm home changes how your whole week feels.
transformation.description: When the house stays under control, evenings become lighter, weekends feel like real time off again and your home becomes a place to recharge.
transformation.subtitle: No more mental checklist running in the background. Just a space that feels good to live in.
benefits: Walk into a clean home after work
Keep your weekends for rest and hobbies
No more arguments about who cleans what
No more mental reminders about chores
Enjoy a calm, organized living space every day
transformation.conclusion: Simply put: life feels easier with a home that stays clean automatically

howItWorks.headline: Simple. Reliable. On repeat.

step1.title: Choose your cleaning plan
step1.description: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning depending on your lifestyle.

step2.title: We take care of the rest
step2.description: Your home is looked after on a regular schedule, so things stay fresh and organized.

step3.title: Enjoy your time
step3.description: Come home to a space that feels calm and ready — without spending your free time managing it.

howItWorks.reassurance: Your plan can be adjusted anytime as life changes.

subscription.headline: A home that stays clean on autopilot
subscription.subheadline: Choose a simple subscription, book once and never have to book again
subscription.description: Your home is cared for on a regular schedule, so things never pile up. No constant reminders. No weekend catch-up cleaning. Just a home that stays in good shape — quietly in the background.

weekly.title: Weekly cleaning
weekly.description: Perfect for busy households and families.

biweekly.title: Bi-weekly cleaning
biweekly.description: Our most popular option for working professionals.

monthly.title: Monthly cleaning
monthly.description: A regular reset that keeps cleaning from piling up.

benefits: A home that stays clean without effort

trust.headline: A service you can trust in your home.
trust.intro: Letting someone into your home requires trust. That's why reliability, transparency, and respect are at the heart of how we work.
trust.subtitle: Every visit should feel simple and safe

vetted.title: Trusted and vetted team
vetted.description: Everyone who visits your home is carefully selected and trained at our partner institutions TAKK, Tredu.

consistency.title: Consistency whenever possible
consistency.description: Same cleaner whenever possible, consistent quality standards.

insured.title: Fully insured service
insured.description: Your home and belongings are protected.

respect.title: Respect for your space
respect.description: Your home is treated with the love, attention, and professionalism it deserves.

ethical.title: Ethical commitment
ethical.description: We believe great service begins with how people are treated. Our team works in fair conditions with proper support and training — creating a service you can trust and feel good about.

whyChooseUs.headline: Built to allow you to focus on what matters.

timeBack.title: Your time back
timeBack.description: Spend evenings and weekends on things you actually enjoy.

autopilot.title: A home on autopilot
autopilot.description: Regular care keeps everything under control without effort.

mentalLoad.title: Less mental load
mentalLoad.description: No reminders, no planning, no weekend catch-up.

flexible.title: Simple and flexible
flexible.description: Plans that fit your lifestyle and adjust when life changes.

testimonials.headline: Trusted by busy households in Tampere

testimonial1.quote: The best decision we made this year. Our weekends are finally free.
testimonial1.author: Anna, Tampere

testimonial2.quote: Our apartment looks amazing every time, and we don't have to think about cleaning anymore.
testimonial2.author: Mikael, Hervanta

servicesOverview.headline: Cleaning services for homes and businesses
servicesOverview.intro: Our focus is regular home cleaning for busy households, but we also offer additional services when you need extra help.
servicesOverview.conclusion: Each service is delivered by trained professionals who care about quality and detail.
servicesOverview.notFound: Can't find the service you're looking for?

finalCta.headline: Ready to enjoy a home that takes care of itself?
finalCta.description: Tell us a little about your home and how often you'd like help. We'll show you the plan that fits your life — simple, flexible, and easy to start.
finalCta.benefits: More time for yourself. Less stress at home.

maintenance.name: Maintenance Cleaning
maintenance.description: Regular cleaning of kitchen, bathroom, and living areas

deepClean.description: Thorough top-to-bottom cleaning including hard-to-reach areas
